\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}
\usepackage[UTF8]{ctex}
\usepackage{amsmath, amssymb, amsthm, amsfonts}
\usepackage{geometry}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{tasks}

\geometry{left=2cm, right=2cm, top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm}

\settasks{
    label=\Alph*.,
    label-width=1.5em,
    item-indent=2em,
    column-sep=10pt
}

\begin{document}

\begin{enumerate}[label=\textbf{题 \arabic*}]

\item 已知函数 \( f(x) = \begin{cases} e^x, & x < 0 \\ x^2 + 1, & x \geq 0 \end{cases} \)，则下列说法正确的是 ( \quad )

\begin{tasks}(4)
    \task \( f(-1) = e \)
    \task \( f(0) = 0 \)
    \task \( f(1) = 1 \)
    \task \( f(f(-1)) = e^2 + 1 \)
\end{tasks}

且函数 \( f(x) \) 的值域为 \underline{\hspace{2cm}}.

\end{enumerate}

\end{document}
